query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN source_url IS NULL OR source_url = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_url FROM research_reports;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN source_url IS NULL OR source_url = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_url FROM research_reports;
